preWriteCommandRows.hardStop: Stop if index grants write permission, approval, release, launch, or production readiness.
Stop if any step lacks input, expected output, failure route, or forbidden actions.
Stop if generated checks grant write permission.
Stop if preview is treated as human authorization.
Stop if dry-run creates or fills the real overlay.
Stop if overwrite protection touches the real overlay or fails sentinel preservation.

preWriteCommandRows.expectedState: reviewer named; scope accepted; direct candidates understood; note fields blank
preWriteCommandRows.hardStop: Stop if no human reviewer explicitly chooses to begin real note-taking.

preWriteCommandRows.expectedState: shown for later human use only; not authorized by this handoff
preWriteCommandRows.hardStop: Stop unless the human-only write decision has actually happened.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Confirm write mode was intentionally reached through manual preflight.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Stop if writeAllowedNow is false and no explicit human decision exists.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Inspect real overlay structure, filled fields, unsafe text, and copying-risk wording.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Fix structural or unsafe-note issues before any intake.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Reject blank, generic, approving, readiness, trading, broker, automation, performance, or real-money notes.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Edit real notes; keep batches blocked until lint passes.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Validate direct-candidate sourceFitNotes contain decision, source role, claim, rewrite action, and no unsafe wording.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Downgrade, block, or rewrite sourceFitNotes before continuing.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Validate batch status shape and required-note completeness.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Keep incomplete batches not_started or in_progress.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Summarize complete notes, blockers, direct-candidate status, and separate-approval candidates.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Treat intake as triage only, not approval.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Keep intake candidates behind a separate human approval review.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Reject auto-approval, learner-facing release, commercial-ready promotion, and production claims.
Fix drift before any broader curriculum checks.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Run the full curriculum and reviewer gate chain.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Fix the failing gate without relaxing boundaries.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Recheck knowledge-base, self-audit, and green grounding boundaries.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Do not promote generated drafts or weaken source boundaries.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Recheck learner-facing browser candidates remain review-tracked and source-grounded.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Block release if learner-facing risk expands.

futurePostWriteCommandRows.purpose: Run full repo verification with TRADEGYM_SQLITE_PATH set to a temp file and clean it afterward.
futurePostWriteCommandRows.failRoute: Fix application verification failures before any next review phase.

authorizationBlockers: Reviewer identity: A real human reviewer must be named before write mode.
Direct candidates: Human must confirm, downgrade, or block each direct candidate in sourceFitNotes.
forbiddenActions: Do not run write mode from this handoff alone.
Do not create or overwrite docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json without explicit human note-taking intent.
Do not treat generated prompts, examples, drills, checklists, freeze packets, authorization previews, or this handoff as real reviewer notes.
Do not confirm direct-candidate sources without human sourceFitNotes.
Do not approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, promote generated drafts to commercial_ready, mark internalTrialReady, mark launchReady, or set productionReady true.
Do not add buy/sell/hold advice, trading signals, performance claims, broker/order workflow, automation, copied source prose, or real-money guidance.
Do not use yellow, red, or research_only sources as learner-facing evidence.
boundary: This day-zero write handoff is generated reviewer-facing operations scaffolding only. It does not authorize write mode, create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, confirm source use, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, promote grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, grant internal-trial readiness, launch the course, or make the product production-ready.
